PJM — the largest US grid — just missed its power supply target by 6.8 GW (almost 7 nuclear reactors) for 2028 because of the AI boom. 
Record $16.4B payouts to generators. 

The grid is under massive pressure and https://t.co/jsI2o0MP6o

The majority of posts are low-quality spam/pump signals (WhatsApp group solicitations) with no substantive content, but the genuine posts reflect a coherent bull thesis around power infrastructure scarcity, operational team buildout, and long-term positioning — with no bearish counterarguments present in the dataset.

Riley financing catalyst expected by late August. However, the stock has pulled back ~34% from its peak near $46.9 to ~$31, with notable short seller activity, skepticism about promotional social media campaigns, and concern over regulatory headwinds such as New York's moratorium on large data centers.
